records.title: OES — Software Developers, Median Annual Wage, 2026
records.summary: BLS OES 2026 reports a $138,700 median annual wage for U.S. software developers, up 2.4% from 2025; top-decile in SF Bay/NYC metro exceeds $215,000.

records.title: OES — Data Scientists, Median Annual Wage, 2026
records.summary: BLS OES 2026 reports a $124,300 median annual wage for data scientists, up 3.1% year-over-year; healthcare and finance verticals pay a $12k median premium.
